description: Fireworks AI is a platform for running and managing generative AI models, including serverless inference, deployments, fine-tuning, datasets, and account administration. It also provides developer tooling and documentation integrations for building applications on top of those models.
summary: Fireworks AI exposes a bearer-token HTTP REST API at api.fireworks.ai, a public docs MCP server at docs.fireworks.ai/mcp, and the authenticated `firectl` CLI.
